hero.description: Hi, I'm Yadigar. I believe every stitch has a story to tell. From cozy blankets to unique accessories, I transform yarn into timeless treasures that bring color and warmth to your life.

footer.rights: Crochet Cafe Finland. All rights reserved.

color_studio.title: Color Lab
color_studio.description: Experiment with yarn combinations on a classic Granny Square motif.

yarn_guide.title: Finland Yarn Guide
yarn_guide.subtitle: Confused about which yarn to use in Finland? Here is my personal guide based on local brands.
yarn_guide.local_tip_desc: In Finnish markets like Prisma or Citymarket, look for the 'Avainlippu' (Key Flag) symbol. It guarantees Finnish design and quality!

socks.title: Wool Socks (Villasukat)
socks.desc: The legendary '7 Brothers' yarn. Durable, warm, and the standard for every Finnish home.

baby.title: Baby Garments
baby.desc: The softest touch for baby's skin. 100% merino wool that is completely itch-free.

toys.title: Amigurumi & Toys
toys.desc: High-quality treated cotton. It doesn't fuzz, making it safe and perfect for toys.

fashion.title: Cardigans & Wraps
fashion.desc: Slightly thinner than 7 Veljestä. Perfect for elegant shawls and lighter indoor garments.

about.p1: My crochet journey began as a hobby and blossomed into a deep passion for creating. I find peace in the rhythm of the hook and the softness of the yarn. I believe handmade items possess a soul that mass-produced goods can never replicate.
about.p2: I specialize in various techniques, from classic amigurumi to modern wearable art. My process is slow and intentional, focusing on high-quality natural fibers and unique color palettes that reflect the beauty of nature.
about.p3: For me, crocheting isn't just about the end result; it's about patience, tradition, and the simple joy of creating something beautiful from a single thread.
about.quote: Crafting by hand allows me to share a piece of my heart with the world, one stitch at a time.

highlights.desc_1: Thoughtful production that respects the craft and the environment.
highlights.desc_2: Using only the finest cotton, wool, and eco-friendly yarns for lasting comfort.
highlights.desc_3: No two items are exactly alike. Each piece is a one-of-a-kind creation.
highlights.desc_4: Expertly crafted pieces intended to be cherished for generations.

contact.success_msg: Message received! I'll get back to you as soon as I put down my hook.
contact.error_msg: Oops! The yarns got tangled. Please try again or email me directly.
contact.header_p: Have a custom design in mind? Or just want to say hi? I'd love to hear from you and create something special just for you.
contact.name: Your Full Name
contact.card_p: My hook is quite busy at the moment, but I always have time for new ideas! Let's talk about your favorite colors and patterns.

exp.header_p: A lifelong passion spanning from childhood dolls to a multicultural vision of craft.
exp.desc_1: Creating unique crochet and textile works in my home studio. Blending Turkish and Finnish craft cultures, laying the foundation for the 'Crochet Cafe' I dream of opening in Finland.
exp.desc_2: Focused on combining traditional Turkish lace and crochet motifs with modern Scandinavian aesthetics. This period was dedicated to refining my signature style.
exp.desc_3: Mastered advanced crochet techniques and sewing. Transitioned from baby clothes to complex wearable art and home decor.
exp.desc_4: My passion for handcrafts began at age five, learning the basics of knitting and sewing while watching my grandmother. I spent my childhood designing wardrobes for my dolls.
exp.desc_future: My dream is to open a physical 'Crochet Cafe' where the aroma of coffee meets the softness of yarn. A cozy space where people can learn, share stories, and experience a true sense of community.

gallery.description: Welcome to my full collection. Each piece is handcrafted with love, attention to detail, and high-quality materials.
gallery.cta_desc: Most of these items can be recreated in your favorite colors. Send me a message on Instagram for orders.

projects.wa_message: Hello! I am interested in the {{item}} from your gallery. Is it still available?
projects.description_main: Explore my latest works, from soft plushies to stylish accessories and home decor.

chick.title: Spring Chick Blossom
chick.desc: A charming handmade amigurumi chick resting under a blooming flower, bringing warmth and joy to any space.

koala.title: Sleepy Koala Comfort Toy
koala.desc: A soft handmade amigurumi koala resting on a cozy blanket, perfect for comforting little ones and adding a gentle touch to any nursery.

sakura.title: Sakura Blossom Bouquet
sakura.desc: A delicate handmade amigurumi sakura bouquet arranged in a glass vase, adding a touch of elegance and everlasting spring to any space.

cat.title: Amigurumi Cat
cat.desc: A soft, handmade crochet cat featuring tiny white paws and a friendly face. This gentle amigurumi companion is perfect for little hands to hold and brings a cozy, handcrafted charm to any shelf or nursery.

hair-acc.title: Lavender Bloom Crochet Hair Twines
hair-acc.desc: Whimsical handmade crochet hair accessories featuring deep purple spirals and vibrant teal leaves. Designed to be woven into braids or ponytails, these lightweight twines add a fairytale touch and a pop of color to any hairstyle.

owl.title: Snowy Wisdom Amigurumi Owl
owl.desc: A soft, handcrafted snowy owl with charming large eyes and a textured puff-stitch finish. This gentle white companion adds a touch of nature-inspired magic to any nursery or cozy corner.

projects.cta_text: Want to see more or place an order?
